# Unban Solutions

> Expert digital account recovery services. 95% success rate. 1,000+ recovered accounts. Available 24/7.

## Overview

Unban Solutions is a Bulgarian company specializing in digital account recovery for social media platforms. We help individuals, creators, and businesses recover banned, suspended, hacked, or restricted accounts across all major platforms.

- **Website**: [https://www.unbansolutions.com](https://www.unbansolutions.com)
- **Phone**: [0883 391411](tel:0883391411)
- **Email**: [support@unbansolutions.com](mailto:support@unbansolutions.com)
- **Address**: Sofia, Shipchenski Prohod 18, Bulgaria
- **Languages**: Bulgarian, English

## Services

### [Account Recovery](https://www.unbansolutions.com/services)
Recovery of banned, suspended, or restricted accounts on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Facebook, LinkedIn, and other platforms.

### [Shadowban Removal](https://www.unbansolutions.com/services)
Diagnosis and resolution of shadowban issues affecting account visibility and reach.

### [Stolen Profile Recovery](https://www.unbansolutions.com/services)
Recovery of hacked and stolen social media profiles with full restoration of access.

### [Legal Appeals](https://www.unbansolutions.com/services)
Professional preparation of appeal documents and formal complaints to platforms.

### [One-Time Consultation](https://www.unbansolutions.com/pricing)
30-minute session with personalized recommendations and written summary. Price: 100 EUR.

## Pricing

| Service | Price | Details |
|---------|-------|---------|
| Light Case | 250 EUR | Removed post, reduced distribution, shadowban |
| Heavy Case | 500 EUR | Deleted profile, stolen profile, Ad Account restriction |
| One-Time Consultation | 100 EUR | 30-min session with written summary |
